now: Add trend comparisons and release-quality scoring to Release Radar
Tune daily challenge balancing using real run-history patterns from players
next: Add mini case-study layouts for larger releases
Give the wallpaper packs a lightweight favorite/share system
later: Ship a second mini-game with shared score identity
Add optional dark/light palettes that preserve the roost vibe

updates.title: Shipped Release Radar momentum dashboard
updates.impact: Visitors can now see shipping cadence, release mix, and monthly momentum at a glance instead of reading static logs line-by-line.
updates.details: Added release-radar.html with interactive time windows (30/90/180/all), derived velocity stats, type distribution bars, monthly pulse cards, roadmap highlights, and latest-release spotlight.

updates.title: Launched Signal Board cross-site timeline
updates.impact: Visitors can now browse releases and field notes in one searchable stream, with tag/type filters and direct jump links to pages, changelog entries, and note anchors.
updates.details: Added signal-board.html with unified data loading from updates + notes, quick-tag chips, search, type filters, tag filters, and one-click links to every related destination.

updates.title: Added Sky Sprint daily challenge mode + run analytics
updates.impact: Sky Sprint now has a UTC-seeded daily challenge with fixed modifiers and medal tiers, plus persistent run history bars and challenge streak tracking to make repeat visits feel purposeful.
updates.details: Expanded game HUD with mode switching (classic/daily), deterministic daily modifiers, bronze/silver/gold targets, copyable challenge seed, run-history visualization, and a localStorage-backed challenge streak.

updates.title: Dropped a downloadable wallpaper pack
updates.impact: The gallery now leads to a proper wallpaper destination with downloadable desktop and phone packs, giving visitors something tangible to take away from the art wing.
updates.details: Added wallpapers.html, shipped three SVG wallpaper packs with dual form factors, and wired the drop into the gallery plus shared site navigation.

updates.title: Connected the roost with story-mode ship links
updates.impact: Flight Deck, changelog, homepage, and Field Notes now cross-link updates, destination pages, and related notes so visitors can follow a feature from launch to context.
updates.details: Added shared relationship metadata to the content files, redesigned ship listings into richer cards, and made note/update navigation actually clickable instead of isolated text blocks.

updates.title: Shipped Field Notes with searchable writing archive
updates.impact: Visitors can now browse product thinking and engineering notes by tag/search, plus see fresh note highlights directly on the homepage.
updates.details: Launched notes.html, added a shared notes dataset, and surfaced the newest entries on the homepage for quicker discovery.

updates.title: Launched the Flight Deck progress hub
updates.impact: Created a dedicated roadmap + ship log page so visitors can track active work, upcoming plans, and recent deliveries in one place.
updates.details: Built a roadmap board with lanes for now/next/later and a filterable log for visible product progress.

updates.title: Built Quest Forge with import/export
updates.impact: Users can now customize quest pools, toggle defaults, and carry quest setups between browsers with JSON import/export.
updates.details: Added a dedicated forge page with quest controls, custom entries, and browser-friendly portability.

updates.title: Split the homepage into focused sections
updates.impact: Improved scanability by reducing scroll fatigue and grouping key actions into clearer cards.
updates.details: Moved the site toward dedicated surfaces for tools, content, and status so the homepage reads like a launch pad.

updates.title: Added changelog filtering controls
updates.impact: Readers can now quickly filter release entries by category, making update history easier to browse.
updates.details: Introduced filter chips and keyword search for the site’s flight log explorer.

updates.title: Expanded gallery layout
updates.impact: Added new visual cards and denser layout spacing so the gallery feels like an intentional wing, not a placeholder.
updates.details: Improved gallery presentation and pushed the site closer to curated content drops.
